_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Verify that application software/network/system security postures are implemented as stated, document deviations, and recommend required actions to correct those deviations.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.501), DQ-T-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.462). Shared vocabulary: [application, system]. DCWF-only terms [actions, correct, deviations, document, implemented, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, causes, code, data, databases] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.863, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (90.7%). The model interprets "Verify that application software/network/system security postures are implemente" as logically implying aspects of "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.530 > STS 0.462 (gap +0.068). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [application, system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.9%. Shared tokens: [application, system]. DCWF-only: [actions, correct, deviations, document, implemented, network]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, causes, code, data, databases].
